# Odometer Tracking

> Maintain a complete, validated history of odometer readings for each vehicle, detecting rollbacks and anomalous jumps, with an approval workflow for corrections.

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fleet · vehicle · odometer · history · validation · mileage

## What this does

Maintain a complete, validated history of odometer readings for each vehicle, detecting rollbacks and anomalous jumps, with an approval workflow for corrections.

Specifies 5 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **vehicle** *(text, required)* — Vehicle
- **reading_date** *(datetime, required)* — Reading Date
- **odometer_value** *(number, required)* — Odometer Value (km)
- **reading_source** *(select, required)* — Reading Source
- **reference_document** *(text, optional)* — Reference Document
- **recorded_by** *(text, optional)* — Recorded By
- **previous_reading** *(number, optional)* — Previous Reading (km)
- **distance_delta** *(number, optional)* — Distance Delta (km)
- **anomaly_reason** *(text, optional)* — Anomaly Reason
- **correction_approved_by** *(text, optional)* — Correction Approved By
- **is_validated** *(boolean, optional)* — Validated
- **status** *(select, required)* — Status

## What must be true

- **reading_monotonic:** Each reading must be >= the previous validated reading; a lower value is treated as a rollback
- **rollback_requires_approval:** A rollback is automatically flagged and requires fleet manager approval before inclusion in history
- **anomaly_threshold:** A distance delta greater than the configured maximum_daily_km threshold triggers an anomaly flag
- **date_not_future:** Reading date cannot be in the future
- **date_progression:** Reading date must be >= the date of the previous reading for the same vehicle
- **update_master_on_valid:** The current odometer on the vehicle master is updated only from validated or approved readings
- **rejected_retained_for_audit:** Rejected readings are retained in history for audit purposes but excluded from calculations

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Rollback Flagged** — when Submitted reading is less than the last validated reading, then Reading is held in flagged status pending fleet manager review.
- **Anomaly Flagged** — when odometer_value is >= previous_reading; distance_delta exceeds the configured maximum_daily_km threshold, then Reading is flagged for manager review.
- **Reading Rejected** — when status is flagged; fleet manager confirms the reading is erroneous, then Reading is excluded from calculations and marked as rejected in the audit trail.
- **Correction Approved** — when status is flagged; fleet manager reviews and confirms the reading is valid, then Approved reading is included in the odometer history and updates the vehicle's last odometer.
- **Reading Validated** — when New reading is at least equal to the last validated reading; distance_delta is within the configured anomaly threshold; reading_date is not in the future, then Reading is accepted, vehicle last odometer is updated, odometer-based maintenance schedules are re-evaluated.

## Errors it can return

- `ODOMETER_ROLLBACK` — This odometer reading is lower than the previous validated reading. Please verify and resubmit, or contact the fleet manager.
- `ODOMETER_FUTURE_DATE` — Odometer reading date cannot be in the future.

## Connects to

- **vehicle-master-data** *(required)* — Vehicle master stores the last validated odometer which anchors each new reading
- **fuel-log** *(recommended)* — Fuel log entries submit odometer readings that are validated by this feature
- **scheduled-maintenance** *(recommended)* — Validated odometer readings trigger re-evaluation of odometer-based maintenance schedules
- **vehicle-maintenance-log** *(recommended)* — Service records include odometer readings that feed into this validation history
